name: Genesis Design System Features
description: Core capabilities of the Genesis Semantic Design System

item.name: Ontological SCSS Engine
item.description: Six semantic categories — environment, entity, cognition, synapse, state, and atmosphere — replace raw CSS with intent-driven mixins. Describe what a region is and the engine determines how it looks.

item.name: 20+ Production Layouts
item.description: Blog posts, articles, dashboards, galleries, chatrooms, documentation, FAQ, landing pages, forms, search, settings, profiles, and more — each layout is responsive and WCAG AA compliant out of the box.

item.name: OKLCH Color System
item.description: Perceptually uniform OKLCH color space with HDR readiness. Every color token is defined in OKLCH for consistent lightness perception across the entire palette.

item.name: Accessibility First
item.description: WCAG AA compliant with proper landmarks, skip links, focus states, 44px touch targets, reduced-motion support, and high-contrast mode. Accessibility is built into the ontology, not bolted on.

item.name: Living Genome Architecture
item.description: The design system evolves through ontological propositions reviewed by AI agents. Every variant has an origin story documented in GENOME.md, creating design with memory.

item.name: Fluid Typography & Responsive Grids
item.description: Fluid clamp()-based type scaling from mobile to ultrawide. Auto-fit CSS Grid layouts with container queries for component-level responsiveness. No media-query breakpoints needed.
